records.m_Talk_FRA: I just hope it won't be too late when you choose to do so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: High Priest, Miss Morgana has returned from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: High Priest, Miss Morgana has returned from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: High Priest, Miss Morgana has returned from the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you expected, the Helgon is with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you expected, the Helgon is with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you expected, the Helgon is with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough* Why is so much dust flying from just opening the door?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough* Why is so much dust flying from just opening the door?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough* Why is so much dust flying from just opening the door?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure about staying in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure about staying in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure about staying in a place like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's way better than just having a campfire in the middle of the gelid lands, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's way better than just having a campfire in the middle of the gelid lands, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's way better than just having a campfire in the middle of the gelid lands, no?

records.m_Talk_DEU: This forest is on the outskirts of the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This forest is on the outskirts of the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not even the sentinels patrol here. So if anything happens, you'll have to handle it yourself.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Not even the sentinels patrol here. So if anything happens, you'll have to handle it yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if the monsters are really approaching here because of me, it would be better if I kept my distance like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if the monsters are really approaching here because of me, it would be better if I kept my distance like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if the monsters are really approaching here because of me, it would be better if I kept my distance like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You can't seriously believe that, do you? They won't appear just because of one person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You can't seriously believe that, do you? They won't appear just because of one person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You can't seriously believe that, do you? They won't appear just because of one person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's a misunderstanding, I don't want to make the villagers afraid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's a misunderstanding, I don't want to make the villagers afraid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's a misunderstanding, I don't want to make the villagers afraid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as you know, Morgana, I'm strong, remember?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And as you know, Morgana, I'm strong, remember?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And as you know, Morgana, I'm strong, remember?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything happens that I can't deal with on my own, I'll ask for your help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything happens that I can't deal with on my own, I'll ask for your help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything happens that I can't deal with on my own, I'll ask for your help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then, take care.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then, take care.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then, take care.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hush, be quiet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hush, be quiet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hush, be quiet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the place, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the place, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the place, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think so. You saw them going in too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think so. You saw them going in too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think so. You saw them going in too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you get everything? Nothing's spoiled, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you get everything? Nothing's spoiled, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you get everything? Nothing's spoiled, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I only picked the freshest ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I only picked the freshest ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I only picked the freshest ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then, let's leave them here and leave before someone sees us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then, let's leave them here and leave before someone sees us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then, let's leave them here and leave before someone sees us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't it be better to give it to her in person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't it be better to give it to her in person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't it be better to give it to her in person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you've got to be kidding. She'll be furious to see us again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you've got to be kidding. She'll be furious to see us again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you've got to be kidding. She'll be furious to see us again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's there?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's there?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's there?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yikes! We've been caught!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yikes! We've been caught!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yikes! We've been caught!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... Karolis?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... Karolis?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... Karolis?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Run!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Run!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Run!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why are you protecting them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why are you protecting them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why are you protecting them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But look at this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But look at this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But look at this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a basket full of fruit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a basket full of fruit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a basket full of fruit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not rotten, are they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not rotten, are they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not rotten, are they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a note.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a note.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a note.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does it say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does it say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does it say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I think that's it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I think that's it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I think that's it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you want some fruit? It's too much for me to eat alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you want some fruit? It's too much for me to eat alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are there any grapes in there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are there any grapes in there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are there any grapes in there?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That owl flying over there... Isn't it the one that Merlin keeps around her?

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been circling this area. Do you think it has something to say to us?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Yikes! We've been caught!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yikes! We've been caught!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're... Karolis?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're... Karolis?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're... Karolis?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Run!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Run!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Run!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You rascals! Are you here to bully Lugh again?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I've had it up to here with you. I ought to teach you a lesson once we're back
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe they're not here with bad intentions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why are you protecting them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why are you protecting them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why are you protecting them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But look at this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But look at this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But look at this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a basket full of fruit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a basket full of fruit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a basket full of fruit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're not rotten, are they?
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're not rotten, are they?
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're not rotten, are they?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think so. They smell so fresh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a note.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a note.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a note.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does it say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does it say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does it say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I'm sorry for the mix-up.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I think that's it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I think that's it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I think that's it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? They hung you upside down, and that's all they have to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for kids their age, I think they did their best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're too soft! If you keep letting them have their way, they'll never get rid of their bad habits!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you want some fruit? It's too much for me to eat alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you want some fruit? It's too much for me to eat alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you want some fruit? It's too much for me to eat alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are there any grapes in there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are there any grapes in there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are there any grapes in there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? That owl flying over there... Isn't it the one that Merlin keeps around her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? That owl flying over there... Isn't it the one that Merlin keeps around her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? That owl flying over there... Isn't it the one that Merlin keeps around her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been circling this area. Do you think it has something to say to us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been circling this area. Do you think it has something to say to us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been circling this area. Do you think it has something to say to us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means Merlin is calling for us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means Merlin is calling for us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means Merlin is calling for us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without telling anyone else, but just us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without telling anyone else, but just us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without telling anyone else, but just us.
